title: Sword Trims
description: Our plugin adds powerful trims to Minecraft swords.
body:
SwordTrims transforms Minecraft's trim system into a powerful gameplay mechanic by granting special abilities based on the trim pattern applied to your sword. With 12 unique trim powers and various swords to combine them on, players can create over 800 different ability combinations to suit their playstyle.
Here is an example trim,

![Example trim](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc8e489fa1104003a62eb99079f1f972270a1344.png)

  Features

  - 12 Powered Sword Trims with unique abilities
  - 800+ Combinations across different armor pieces and materials
  - Balanced Cooldowns to ensure fair PvP and PvE gameplay
  - Passive and Active Abilities for diverse combat strategies

  Trim Powers

  Eye Trim

  - Effect: Glowing on hit + 15% chance to inflict Blindness II for 45 seconds
  - Type: Offensive/Utility

  Silence Trim

  - Effect: Unleash a devastating sonic boom attack
  - Cooldown: 45 seconds
  - Type: Offensive

  Bolt Trim

  - Effect: 10% chance to strike your target with lightning
  - Type: Offensive

  Vex Trim

  - Effect: Summon 5 vexes to fight for you
  - Cooldown: 1 minute 30 seconds
  - Type: Summoning

  Flow Trim

  - Effect: Dash forward rapidly
  - Cooldown: 5 seconds
  - Type: Mobility

  Wild Trim

  - Effect: Gain Speed III + Strength I for 15 seconds on player kill
  - Type: Combat Enhancement

  Rib Trim

  - Effect: Enter berserker mode with Slowness IV + Strength III
  - Cooldown: 1 minute 30 seconds
  - Type: High-Risk/High-Reward Combat

  Coast Trim

  - Effect: Passive Dolphin's Grace + 3 extra hearts while in water
  - Type: Aquatic/Passive

  Tide Trim

  - Effect: Unleash a water wave dealing 4 hearts of true damage
  - Cooldown: 1 minute 30 seconds
  - Type: Offensive

  Sentry Trim

  - Effect: Mark and see players through walls
  - Cooldown: 90 seconds
  - Type: Tactical/Utility

  Ward Trim

  - Effect: Complete damage immunity for 5 seconds
  - Cooldown: 2 minutes
  - Type: Defensive

  Dune Trim

  - Effect: Pull enemies toward you and blind them
  - Cooldown: 1 minute
  - Type: Crowd Control

  Excluded Trims

  The following vanilla trim patterns are not included in this plugin:
  - HOST
  - WAYFINDER
  - RAISER
  - SHAPER
  - SCOUT
  - SPIRE
  ---
